variants: Originally from Robinswell Junction, Tarun Malhotra now resides in Willowark Meadows. He is best known for his invention, the Amber Current Stabilizer, which has played a critical role in the field of energy management. His innovative work in this arena has earned him the prestigious Legacy Aegis Insignia. In his leisure time, Tarun enjoys engaging with fellow enthusiasts as a member of the Desert Glass Walkers, a club dedicated to exploring the aesthetics of desert glass art.
